_comment: NXM-038 REV 2 Step 1 panel manifest. Every panel in the control plane is listed here with its honest data-source state. The badge-tally grep gate (G2) verifies: (1) every panel in the app has a DataSourceBadge with a matching panelId, (2) the count matches this manifest, (3) no panel renders data without a badge (D-005). States: wired | pack | seed | mock | off. Per FABLE5 D-005: no fabricated data presented as real.

_states.pack: Operator-published STATE_PACK via git-bus (live host truth)
_states.seed: Real DB structure, preset values, no live source
_states.mock: Hardcoded placeholder, not connected to any source

panels.label: Lane Grid
panels.note: 14 lanes from src/lib/registry.ts. Statuses are SEED baseline. Will become PACK when STATE_PACK ingestion lands (Step 3).

panels.label: Stats Row
panels.note: Lane count + tool count from /api/lanes + /api/health (real API calls).

panels.label: Ledger Tail
panels.note: GET /api/ledger?limit=15 — reads NEXUS_LEDGER_PATH or sample_ledger.jsonl. Real JSONL reader.

panels.label: MCP Health
panels.note: GET /api/mcp/health — probes 127.0.0.1:7354/health with honest STUB fallback. NOTE: FABLE5 found the health route reads payload.registry_hash but the live bridge emits registry_security.registry_schema_hash — fix pending Step 4.

panels.label: Queue Snapshot
panels.note: Inline mock in /api/mcp/queue route. Will become PACK (from state_pack.mcp.queue) in Step 4.

panels.label: Tool Inventory
panels.note: 22 static tools from src/lib/mcpTools.ts. Will become PACK (25 live tools) in Step 4. FABLE5 confirmed drift = 3 tools: continuity_append, continuity_tail, cdp_window_probe.

panels.label: Lane Doctrine
panels.note: 14 lanes from registry.ts with doctrine text. Statuses are SEED baseline. Will become PACK in Step 3.

panels.label: Handoff Bus
panels.note: GET /api/handoffs — real file-backed store (data/handoffs.json). Create form POSTs real cards.

panels.label: Browserless Fetch
panels.note: OFF in sandbox (BROWSERLESS_TOKEN always absent). Will be WIRED in host-mode (NXM-044). Per D-005: must not present demo data as real.

panels.label: Mission Board Cards
panels.note: Renders pack.board.cards (42 NXM cards). PACK when state_pack.json loaded, SEED when using test_pack.example.json sentinel. No pack → import banner + 42 NXM-SEED watermarked cards.

panels.label: SAGE Status
panels.note: RESERVED — gated on OG-6. Per FABLE5 D6: v2 backlog, not in REV 2. /api/sage returns {status:'RESERVED', gated_on:'OG-6'}. UI renders a lock panel + planned interface contract.

panels.label: Ledger Integrity Chain
panels.note: D7 v2: SHA-256 hash chain over ledger rows. GET /api/ledger/integrity computes chain head + per-entry hashes. proof_chain concept at the ledger layer.

panels.label: Handoff ↔ Ledger Cross-Link
panels.note: D7 v2: frontend join between HandoffCard tokens and LedgerRow references. Shows which handoffs have ledger evidence (green dot) and which don't (gray dot).

panels.label: Research Coverage
panels.note: D7 v3: papers section display. Shows total papers (646), gap-area breakdown (G1-G6), coverage %, integration passes (P1-P4), and highest-impact paper-to-component mappings. OFF when no papers section in pack.

_gates.G2: badge-tally grep gate: grep -rc 'DataSourceBadge' src/app/ must equal panels.length in this manifest; every panel page must reference DataSourceBadge at least once with a panelId matching this file.
_gates.G3: negative control: full no-pack walk of all pages must show zero unbadged MOCK/SEED surfaces
